description: As the largest city in East Tennessee, Knoxville is the heart of Tristar Locksmith's service territory. From downtown and the University of Tennessee area to the suburbs of West Knoxville and North Knoxville, our technicians are positioned throughout the city for fast response. Whether you need a car lockout, a home rekey, or commercial lock installation, Tristar Locksmith is Knoxville's trusted local choice.
